overall.description: Nighttime driving sequence from GTA V showing a vehicle traveling along a multi-lane highway under concrete overpasses. The camera moves from the traffic lanes to the right shoulder, passing concrete walls and streetlights while heading toward a distinctive illuminated tower in the distance.

agents.ego_description: driving forward in the right lane under highway overpasses with moderate traffic

notable_agents.action: white van driving ahead in the right lane
black sedan driving in the left lane

entered.detail: concrete highway overpass structure spanning across the road with embedded lights
tall concrete wall with vertical ridges running along the left side of the highway
overhead street lights attached to the overpass structure illuminating the road

segments.scene_description: The segment shows nighttime driving under concrete highway overpasses in a multi-lane road. The vehicle travels in the right lane with moderate traffic including a white van ahead and a black sedan to the left. Overhead streetlights illuminate the asphalt while a concrete sound barrier runs along the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway shoulder next to concrete wall

events.description: passing a white armored truck on the right side
vehicle moves from traffic lanes to the right shoulder alongside the concrete wall

agents.ego_description: moving to the right shoulder and driving alongside the concrete retaining wall

notable_agents.action: white armored truck being passed on the right side before moving to shoulder

entered.detail: smooth concrete retaining wall immediately adjacent to the right shoulder
illuminated tower structure visible in the distance ahead against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The vehicle passes a white armored truck and transitions from the traffic lanes to the right shoulder, driving close to a smooth concrete retaining wall. The left-side sound barrier falls behind as a distinctive illuminated tower becomes visible in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway shoulder with distant tower view

agents.ego_description: continuing along the right shoulder next to the concrete wall with sparse nearby traffic

entered.detail: large illuminated billboard with purple and white lighting visible on the right side

segments.scene_description: Driving steadily along the highway shoulder with the concrete wall immediately to the right. The illuminated tower grows larger in the center view while a lit billboard appears on the right side. Overhead overpasses continue to block the sky as the vehicle maintains speed.

agents.ego_description: driving along the shoulder with the tower landmark visible ahead, maintaining steady speed

notable_agents.action: car driving on the main lanes to the right of the shoulder

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues along the highway shoulder with the concrete wall on the right and the illuminated tower prominently visible ahead. The billboard passes behind as the vehicle approaches the tower area, with occasional cars visible on the adjacent lanes.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a nighttime highway that transitions from dense traffic lanes to a solitary drive along the shoulder toward a distant landmark. It begins with the vehicle navigating a multi-lane road under concrete overpasses, passing a white van and a black sedan beneath the glow of overhead streetlights. As the vehicle passes a white armored truck, it shifts from the traffic lanes onto the right shoulder, leaving the left-side sound barriers behind as a distinctive illuminated tower emerges on the horizon. The scene then progresses steadily along a smooth concrete retaining wall, passing a lit billboard while the tower grows larger in the center of the frame. Finally, the camera maintains its course along the shoulder, leaving the billboard behind and approaching the prominently lit tower as occasional cars flicker by in the adjacent lanes.
